name: Southwestern Green Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the tomato soup and salsa topping by combining 3/4 cup tomato soup, 1/4 cup water, 1/4 cup salsa of choice, and 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder in a bowl.
2. Par boil the peppers for 3-4 minutes to help sweeten them slightly.
3. In a large bowl, mix together ground turkey breast, 1/4 cup tomato soup, salt, pepper, minced onion, cooked rice, 1/4 cup salsa, taco seasoning mixture, cumin, and shredded cheese with frozen corn.
4. Scoop the turkey mixture into the cooled green peppers, mounding it on top. If you have leftover meat mixture, form small meatballs and place them between the peppers.
5. Pour the sauce mixture over the stuffed peppers.
6. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
7. Serve with additional vegetables if desired.
